description: An AI assistant with real-time knowledge of New York City transit data for trip planning and service status.
name: NYC Transit Agent

skills.description: Get upcoming train arrivals at a station. Accepts station ID or name (e.g., "127", "Times Square", "14th Street").
skills.name: mta_get_arrivals

skills.description: Get current service status for a subway line
skills.name: mta_get_line_status

skills.description: List active service alerts across the subway system. By default only shows currently active alerts.
skills.name: mta_list_alerts

skills.description: Search for stations by name or line
skills.name: mta_search_stations

skills.description: Get detailed information about a specific station. Accepts station ID or name.
skills.name: mta_get_station_info

skills.description: Get route suggestions between two stations. Accepts station IDs or names.
skills.name: mta_plan_trip

skills.description: Get planned service changes, weekend schedules, and construction work. Shows what service changes are active now, coming later today, this weekend, and in the next week.
skills.name: mta_get_planned_work

skills.description: Get active bus service alerts. Optionally filter by route or severity.
skills.name: bus_list_alerts

skills.description: Get upcoming bus arrivals at a stop. Accepts stop ID or name (e.g., "402940", "5 Av/W 42 St").
skills.name: bus_get_arrivals

skills.description: Get detailed information about a bus route including type, boroughs served, and description.
skills.name: bus_get_route_info

skills.description: Search bus stops by name, route, or borough. Use this to find stop IDs for bus_get_arrivals.
skills.name: bus_search_stops

skills.description: Get upcoming ferry arrivals at a landing. Accepts landing ID or name (e.g., "PIER11", "Wall Street", "DUMBO").
skills.name: ferry_get_arrivals

skills.description: Get active ferry service alerts. Optionally filter by route.
skills.name: ferry_list_alerts

skills.description: Search ferry landings by name, route, or borough. Use this to find landing IDs for ferry_get_arrivals.
skills.name: ferry_search_landings

skills.description: List all NYC Ferry routes with their landings. Optionally get details for a specific route.
skills.name: ferry_get_routes

skills.description: Get bike and dock availability at a Citibike station. Accepts station ID or name (e.g., "Broadway & W 48 St", "E 40 St & Park Ave").
skills.name: bike_get_station_status

skills.description: Search for Citibike stations by name, borough, or availability. Returns station availability and capacity.
skills.name: bike_search_stations

skills.description: Get an overview of Citibike availability by borough. Shows total bikes, docks, and station availability.
skills.name: bike_get_availability_summary

skills.description: Get upcoming LIRR or Metro-North departures at a station. Accepts station ID or name (e.g., "PENN", "Grand Central").
skills.name: rail_get_departures

skills.description: Get active LIRR and Metro-North service alerts. Optionally filter by system, branch, or severity.
skills.name: rail_list_alerts

skills.description: Search LIRR and Metro-North stations by name, system, or branch. Use this to find station IDs for rail_get_departures.
skills.name: rail_search_stations

skills.description: Get detailed information about a LIRR or Metro-North station including accessibility, platforms, parking, and zone.
skills.name: rail_get_station_info

skills.description: Ask natural language questions about NYC transit (subway, bus, ferry, rail, bike). Examples: "When is the next 1 train at Times Square?", "How do I get to JFK?", "Are there any Citibikes near Grand Central?"
skills.name: transit_ask
